'''Brask Oto Command Station''' was a facility set up by the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]] at the entry of [[The Redoubt/Legends|The Redoubt]]. The station itself acted as a battle station. It was located in the [[Brask Oto Command Station system]], in [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss space]] in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown regions]]. It was located in square H-7.<ref name="EAOC" />

==History==
It was shaped like a double pyramid, and was under the command of [[Station Commander]] [[Prard'enc'iflar]].
The crew and guests of the ''[[Chaf Envoy]]'' briefly stopped there on their journey to [[Outbound Flight Project|''Outbound Flight'']] in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]].
